creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
(In reply to Koop Mast from comment #2)

I can't say and I do not dare to decide. If the port sin't causing issues at the moment, I'd say the port could stay for, say the next 60 days in the tree with a warning and delegation that it is deprecated and superseeded by lang/pocl and about to be retired.

My opinion.
